summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hotmart Super Agent Module 1 (Market Research). All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend dashboard, country detail panel, research execution, search/filter/sort functionality all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded from all API responses
Error handling is properly implemented with appropriate HTTP status codes
LLM integration has proper fallback to heuristic analysis when API fails
test_credentials: No authentication required for this module
seed_data_creation: Research was executed for all 5 countries (AR, CL, CO, PE, BR) during testing, generating 25 trends total
context_for_next_testing_agent: Module 1 is fully functional. All 5 countries have been researched with 5 trends each. Backend tests cover: health check, countries list, research overview, research execution with polling, trends CRUD with sorting, country summary, delete trends, Module 2 placeholder (501). Frontend tests cover: dashboard load, country cards, detail panel, executive summary, trends table, search, intent filters, column sorting, progress bar during research.

tests: Country detail panel opens on card click
